mapper.insert: INSERT INTO inbound_order ( order_no, supplier_name, total_amount, order_status, remark ) VALUES ( #{orderNo}, #{supplierName}, #{totalAmount}, #{orderStatus}, #{remark} )
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM inbound_order
order_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{orderNo}, '%')
SELECT id, order_no, supplier_name, total_amount, order_status, remark, created_time FROM inbound_order WHERE id = #{id}
